autonomousCodeOnlyQaObjectives.title: make the local baseline gate complete, deterministic, and easy to run.
remove hidden ordering and machine-dependence from QA scripts.
guarantee every page, route handler, server action, and product surface is inventoried.
ensure every product mode boundary is testable.
cover all auth flows without production credentials.
close horizontal and vertical authorization gaps.
cover international and cognitive stress cases.
cover mode-private workflows without public exposure.
automate sensitive-domain absence or scope evidence.
make release preflight code-owned where safe.
cover contract list and detail behavior.
prove every navigable surface is reachable intentionally.
enforce release-safe public positioning in code-owned content.
harden query-cost and pagination abuse controls.
test browser and app state transitions.
test money and billing-adjacent code without live charges.
test public embed/share surfaces if present.
cover supported browser engines and device classes.
prepare for localization even if not launched.
prove every code-only QA objective is either implemented or blocked by a non-code boundary.

e2eQuarantineJson.note: Quarantine list empty — optional skip specs remain file-local; check-e2e-quarantine --strict validates rows when non-empty.
